stemHtml: A student pilot is coming back from a solo flight but has become lost due to low visibility. There is no wind. Which of the following should be requested to ATC?

options.a: QDM to get the true track to the airport.
options.b: QDR to get the true bearing from the airport.
options.c: QUJ to get the magnetic track to the airport.
options.d: QDM to get the magnetic track to the airport.
